headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 3, 2026**
article:
The Minnesota Twins edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 4-3 in a closely contested game, with Kazuma Okamoto leading the Blue Jays' offense with a home run and two RBIs. The Houston Astros secured a 3-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox, with Bryan Abreu earning the win. The Cincinnati Reds dropped a 1-0 decision to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Gregory Soto earning the win.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. The Boston Red Sox placed Patrick Sandoval on the 60-day injured list due to recovery from left UCL surgery. Danny Coulombe was also placed on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 2, 2026, with cervical spasms. The Detroit Tigers placed Tarik Skubal on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 1, 2026, with loose bodies in his left elbow.

The Detroit Tigers acquired infielder Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash. The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired 2B Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays for cash, while the Toronto Blue Jays acquired C Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers in a separate trade.

top_news.title: **Twins Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 4-3 in a closely contested game. Kazuma Okamoto led the Blue Jays' offense with a home run and two RBIs.

top_news.title: **Astros Take Down Red Sox 3-1**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros secured a 3-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox, with Bryan Abreu earning the win.

top_news.title: **Reds Fall Short in Pittsburgh**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds dropped a 1-0 decision to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Gregory Soto earning the win. Chase Burns led the Pirates' pitching staff with 7.0 innings pitched, 7 strikeouts, and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Fall to Yankees in Blowout**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Baltimore Orioles 11-3, handing them a tough loss. Jasson Domínguez led the Orioles' offense with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Place Patrick Sandoval on 60-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Boston Red Sox left-handed pitcher Patrick Sandoval has been placed on the 60-day injured list due to recovery from left UCL surgery.

top_news.title: **Tigers Acquire Zack Short in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers have acquired infielder Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash.
